module_summary:
Tiny CSV parsing / normalisation helpers.
class NormalizationError(ValueError):
    '''Raised on irrecoverable CSV-shape errors (e.g. unbalanced quotes).'''
def normalize_header(header: str): ...
def strip_bom(text: str): ...
def detect_delimiter(text: str, candidates: Sequence[str] = DEFAULT_DELIMITERS): ...
def parse_row(line: str, delimiter: str = ','): ...
def parse_csv(text: str, delimiter: str | None = None): ...
def is_numeric(value: str): ...
def coerce_value(value: str): ...
def _needs_quoting(field: str, delimiter: str): ...
def _quote(field: str): ...
def write_row(values: Iterable[Any], delimiter: str = ','): ...
def write_csv(rows: Iterable[dict[str, Any]], fields: Sequence[str] | None = None, delimiter: str = ','): ...
